sections.paragraph:
-

(1) i.q. שָׁאָה to make a noise, to crash; also to be laid waste, destroyed; whence שֹׁוא, שֹׁואָה, מְשֹׁואָה, תְּשֻׁאֹות.

(2) i.q. Arab. سَا ءَ Med. Waw, to be evil. (Both these significations are also found joined in the verbs רָעַע, רָשַׁע, which see.) Hence שָׁוְא.

שוא

m. pl. [with suff. שֹׁאֵיהֶם], destruction, ruin, Psa 35:17. Root שֹׁוא No. 1. See f. שֹׁואָה .
